description: Transavia is a Dutch airline that sells flights and related travel services. It offers partner and affiliate integrations so third parties can search fares, book flights, and access related airline data.
summary: Transavia exposes a documented HTTP API surface for developers: the Airports API v2 at `https://api.transavia.com/v2/airports`, authenticated by a Transavia-issued subscription key via header or query parameter. No public evidence of GraphQL APIs, MCP servers, or CLIs was found.
